name: Buttermilk Waffles with Raspberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir dry ingredients into a large bowl.
2. Beat buttermilk and eggs at low speed using the whisk attachment of the Handy Mixer cordless beater in a medium bowl.
3. Slowly add melted butter.
4. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
5. Add buttermilk mixture to the well, using a beater attachment, slowly blending at low speed until all liquid ingredients are incorporated. Then beat at high speed until smooth, reserving the liquid.
6. Puree raspberries in a food processor or blender until smooth.
7. Blend in sugar and orange rind, and enough of the reserved liquid until the sauce reaches the desired thickness.
8. Pour 1 cup of waffle batter into a preheated, well-greased waffle iron and cook until golden.
9. Serve with Raspberry Sauce. Garnish with walnuts and fresh raspberries, if desired.
10. Serves 4.
